final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing employee ID card for ByteDance (字节跳动), showing both front and back sides.

Style/medium: photorealistic product photography, corporate ID card mockup with realistic plastic PVC texture
Composition: flat lay top-down view showing two cards side by side (front and back), clean studio backdrop
Subject: employee ID badge with lanyard hole, company name "字节跳动" visible, employee photo placeholder area, ID number field
Scene/backdrop: neutral gray or white seamless background, subtle shadow beneath cards
Lighting/mood: soft diffused studio lighting from above, minimal shadows, clean corporate aesthetic
Color palette: ByteDance brand blue and white as base, subtle gradients on card surface
Materials/textures: matte PVC plastic with slight gloss at edges, realistic printed ink texture, subtle embossed effect
Text (verbatim): "字节跳动"
Constraints: must show both front and back sides in one image; front side displays employee photo and name; back side displays barcode/QR code and company info
Avoid: cartoonish rendering, overly glossy plastic, distorted text, watermark, generic template look
